_comment: Custom UDP Logs (input package 'udp') receiving RouterOS dns,packet remote syslog on UDP 5145. Created via Fleet API simplified format: POST /api/fleet/package_policies. INPUT-PACKAGE GOTCHA: the verbose inputs[] format fails with 'Stream template not found' for input packages on 8.19; the simplified format works and the stream key MUST be 'udp.udp'. data_stream.dataset var overrides the index -> logs-mikrotik_dns-default. pipeline var runs our parse pipeline.
name: mikrotik-dns-1
description: RouterOS dns,packet remote syslog on UDP 5145 -> A-record parse for IP->domain enrichment.
